title: Moonless Shitpost
description: Several memes and jokes surrounding the minecraft mod no_moon.jar.
body:
# General content
This mod adds several jokes and memes from the no_moon.jar community (primarily the discord) and implements them as either items, entities or structures. These are listed below.
# A FAIR WARNING
Due to the nature of no_moon.jar, this mod might also not run very well. Second of all, WD69420 can be kind of preformance heavy, due to his ability to duplicate itself (to a limit of course). Keep in mind that you might get preformance loss or game crashes when you encounter him.

## Items:
- Baby void (original by RedPalm)
- VoidMobile (also by RedPalm)
- Edible Billy and ErrorCode
- Explosive void

## Entities:
- Baby void (Sprite still by RedPalm)
- Voidmobile (Idem)
- Explosive void
- WD69420 (Sprite also by redpalm)

## Behaviours:
- Every world has a 10% chance on creation to, instead of having Nothing_Left and Billy as your guides, having Minos Prime and Sisyphus Prime from the hit indie game ULTRAKILL as your guides instead, proving much less helpful but kind of entertaining.

## Structures:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
- A netherrack pillar that mimics the one players find the broken command block on top of, confusing the player (hopefully). 
</details>

Keep in mind, this mod is not to be taken seriously, non-canon and not reccomended for a first playtrough.
